title: When I Think On The Happy Days.
content:
I.

        When I think on the happy days
            I spent wi' you, my dearie;
        And now what lands between us lie,
            How can I be but eerie!

II.

        How slow ye move, ye heavy hours,
            As ye were wae and weary!
        It was na sae ye glinted by,
            When I was wi' my dearie.
meaning:
"When I Think On The Happy Days." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
